messages.content:
Which are common applications of Deep Learning in Artificial Intelligence (AI)?


image processing and speech recognition


image processing, language translation, and complex game play


image processing, speech recognition, and natural language processing (NLP)


language translation and complex game play


I don't know this yet.
The correct answer is: image processing, speech recognition, and natural language processing (NLP).

What is Machine Learning (ML)?


The process of using specialized hardware resources to present patterns in situational data.


The process of taking existing data and analyzing it to identify patterns and to make better predictions about new data.


The process of taking new data and applying various off-the-shelf algorithms to understand older data.


The process of making assumptions about existing customers to guide future business decisions.
The correct answer is: The process of taking existing data and analyzing it to identify patterns and to make better predictions about new data.

Which statement is true regarding Artificial Intelligence (AI)?


Strong AI and Weak AI are equally well developed at this time.


AI can exist without humans supporting it.


Data is the fundamental reason AI succeeds or fails.


AI will eventually eliminate most human jobs.
The correct answer is: Data is the fundamental reason AI succeeds or fails.

Cloud-based services can open doors to leveraging Artificial Intelligence (AI) without dramatically increasing risk.

Which client is best suited for these kind of opportunities?


a client that handles highly sensitive data and seeking to maximize security


a small or medium business that lacks substantial on-site computing resources


a company with strict rules for levels of data access among its employees


a large company with expansive on-site computing infrastructure and hosting servers
The correct answer is: a small or medium business that lacks substantial on-site computing resources.

Which describes the state of “weak” vs. “strong” Artificial Intelligence (AI) in the marketplace?


The marketplace will have “strong” AI solutions ready for delivery within the next year.


The current state of AI offerings would be classified mostly as “weak” AI at this point.


Current AI models can adapt on their own across domains of data, without intervention.


AI models have surpassed human capabilities to evolve and change.
The correct answer is: The current state of AI offerings would be classified mostly as “weak” AI at this point.

What is a major benefit of working with a ready-to-use cloud-based Artificial Intelligence (AI) vendor service?


decreased barrier to entry


increased security


dedicated infrastructure


decreased computing power
The correct answer is: decreased barrier to entry.

How long has Artificial Intelligence (AI) existed?


30 to 40 years


more than 50 years


10 to 20 years


less than 10 years
The correct answer is: more than 50 years.

A data scientist is writing a Machine Learning (ML) algorithm using a large data set.

What is produced when the data scientist compiles the code?


a graph


a model


a neural network


a Bayesian network
The correct answer is: a model.

Which business case is better solved by Artificial Intelligence (AI) than conventional programming?


sending email notifications for overdue invoices


predicting characteristics of high-value customers


managing a calendar to schedule multiple patients in a single day


calculating interest rates for variable-interest rate loans


I don't know this yet.
The correct answer is: predicting characteristics of high-value customers.

What is a benefit of applying Artificial Intelligence (AI) to Accenture’s work?


It will reduce the amount of time Accenture people interact with clients.


It will allow Accenture people to perform critical job functions more efficiently and effectively.


It will redirect Accenture people’s work toward administrative and data collection tasks.


It will replace many of the current jobs held by Accenture employees.
The correct answer is: It will allow Accenture people to perform critical job functions more efficiently and effectively.

When leveraging Artificial Intelligence (AI) in today's business landscape, which statement represents the data leveraged for solutions?


Quality data is often trapped in silos, and not accessible across client functions.


Organizations typically have enough data to support all desired AI efforts.


Companies are usually agile enough to analyze data quickly and without error.


Data is highly trusted, and employees have high rates of data literacy.
The correct answer is: Quality data is often trapped in silos, and not accessible across client functions.

What is one of four key principles of Responsible Artificial Intelligence (AI)?


Companies are not liable for violations of the law that result from the actions of AI.


Accountability for decisions ultimately lies with computer algorithms.


Any biases that may arise from AI processes are justifiable if they are backed by data.


Decision-making processes should be transparent and understandable.
The correct answer is: Decision-making processes should be transparent and understandable.
